nodes.name: Filter: Not Used in 14 Days
nodes.notes: Also allows hooks with last_used_at > 14 days ago. Handled in code node.

parameters.jsonBody:
={{ JSON.stringify({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 1000, messages: [{ role: 'user', content: `You are a short-form video scriptwriter for VOLT Sleep, an energy optimization app. Write a 15-30 second video script.

Hook: ${$json.hook}
Angle: ${$json.angle}

Rules:
- NO medical claims (no "cure", "treat", "diagnose", "insomnia", "disorder")
- Performance/energy framing ONLY
- Simple, sharp language
- No shame
- Include exactly one actionable tip

Format:
[HOOK 0-2s] (pattern interrupt)
[PROBLEM 2-8s] (name the pain)
[REFRAME 8-18s] (behavioral science insight, 1-2 sentences)
[TIP 18-25s] (concrete action)
[CTA 25-30s] "VOLT Sleep gives you 1 action per day. Free. Link in bio."

Also provide:
- Caption (under 150 chars, include 1 question)
- 5 hashtags
- Thumbnail text (5 words max)
- 3 on-screen text overlays with timestamps` }] }) }}
